The Great Northern objected on
the ground that 1t would be impos.

Most of the concessions were ac-
corded In Difference to the argu-
ments offered and intelligent inter
est shown by several property
owners who followed the proceed
ings closely on the map and had
no hesitancy in making their needs
known.
